title: Salter 114 BKCLDR Mechanical Kitchen Scale, Compact, 5 Kg Max Capacity, Dishwasher Safe Bowl, Easy Clean, Scale Fits Inside Pan, Dust-Free Storage, Metric/Imperial, Transparent, 1 Litre
features: Product 1: Compact and lightweight, this Mechanical Kitchen Scale from Salter is perfect for all bakers and avid chefs weighing up to 5 Kg
Product 1: The easy to read, clock face dial is large enough to be able to see without squinting and the rotating dial shows in metric/imperial
Product 1: The removable bowl is dishwasher safe for quick and easy cleaning, and can be neatly stored as the scale fits inside the bowl
Product 1: Simple and environmentally friendly, these manual scales don’t require wires or batteries, just pop your ingredients into the bowl
description: Salter 114 BKCLDR Mechanical Kitchen Scale, Compact, 5 Kg Max Capacity, Dishwasher Safe Bowl, Easy Clean, Scale Fits Inside Pan, Dust-Free Storage, Metric/Imperial, Large Dial, BlackCompact with a generous sized dish, this Mechanical Kitchen Scale from Salter is perfect for all bakers. The mechanical dial display is large and easy to read, ensuring measurements can be read in metric or imperial to suit your preferences. Remove the bowl for simple dust-free storage by popping the scale inside. Easy to clean, the removable bowl is dishwasher safe for straightforward cleaning. With a max capacity of 5 Kg, you can measure all your ingredients that you may need when baking.Pyrex Glass Measuring Jug, Transparent, 1 LitreMade from Borosilicate Glass this product has high thermal shock resistance. Stain and scratch resistant, does not retain flavours. Conventional Oven Safe to 300 degress C. Microwave, Fridge & Freezer Safe. Dishwasher Proof. Easy Grip Handles. Guaranteed for 10 years against manufacturers defect.
